name: Eggless, Milkless, Butterless Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar, hot water, shortening, salt, raisins, cinnamon, and cloves in a large bowl.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Add the flour and soda dissolved in 1 teaspoon of hot water to the mixture. Stir until just combined.
4. Divide the batter evenly between two greased bread pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) for approximately 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pans for about 10 minutes before turning off the heat and transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
Note: This is also called a depression cake.
